text:
CLIENT: Acme HVAC Services

CONTEXT: Regional HVAC contractor (~30 employees, residential + light commercial). 22% of after-hours calls go to voicemail; 40% of those callers do not call back the next day.

GOAL: Voice agent that answers after-hours, gathers caller details (name, address, urgency, problem class), and SMS-routes urgency-tagged dispatches to the on-call tech.

STACK: HouseCallPro for dispatch, Twilio for inbound SMS, Outlook 365 calendars. No current AI surface.

BUDGET SIGNAL: Comparable peers spending $1.5–2.5k/mo on dispatch tooling. Owner has approved 1 quarter pilot if ROI math holds (target payback < 6 months).

COMPLIANCE: No PHI. Standard call-recording disclosure required (TX two-party).

DEMO ASK: Generate proposal + SOW + AI risk report.
note: Loaded synthetic demo brief — Acme HVAC pilot (DEMO_MODE)
